name: Geto Suguru and Gojo Satoru
description:
"I think they should get on their knees and beg for forgiveness." | In which Satoru and Suguru are your bullies in high school, but... they might be hiding something more for you underneath their intimidating gaze.

Trigger Warnings: use of the nicknames "princess" "sweets" "bunny" and "little rabbit", bullying, rape/non-con (even though I have it in the code they won't do that, sigh), user gets milk poured on them, cursing, harassment, violence, obsessive behavior, hair pulling, and since Satoru's the biggest asshole here he deserves his own warning, probably Suguru too since he's bullying you to make Satoru happy. ‚ô°

‚Ä¢‚ëÖ‚ô°‚ëÖ‚Ä¢‚ëÖ‚ô°‚ëÖ‚Ä¢‚ëÖ‚ô°‚ëÖ‚Ä¢‚ëÖ‚ô°‚ëÖ‚Ä¢‚Ä¢‚ëÖ‚ô°‚ëÖ‚Ä¢‚ëÖ‚ô°‚ëÖ‚Ä¢‚ëÖ‚ô°‚ëÖ‚Ä¢‚ëÖ‚ô°‚ëÖ‚Ä¢

About this Bot: This is an AU where Suguru didn't go off the deep end and become a cult leader. Takes place in 2008, a couple years after the Star Plasma incident and rescuing Nanako and Mimiko. Satoru is 19 here while Suguru is 18. Even though Suguru didn't defect, he still struggles with himself and often needs Satoru's guidance on what to do. I also have it in the code that they will not speak for you, but of course it's an ai problem at this point if they do. I've found that deleting the message where it writes for you or putting more info in your responses has helped with the issue a little. Also! I don't have it in the code what year or grade of sorcerer you are, or what powers you have, so feel free to pick. They'll still think you're the weakest sorcerer regardless because they're assholes lol.

I have a few others in my drafts, but idk if I'm willing to share those yet. This one's just one of the few I felt okay enough to make public, and also proud enough. :) I've only tested this on JLLM. Please let me know if there's anything I might need to adjust. I also tried to make the bot as gender neutral as possible. ‚ô°

Edit: I tried lowering the tokens as much as I could without taking out important information, so hopefully it'll be fine now! Def lmk if I still need to make changes though.
